jinx.reason: Alch Ability is: You know how many Outsiders are in play. Learn if an Outsider ever leaves play. [+0 or +1 Outsider]
The Alchemist might not learn what ability the Demon has.
Alch Ability is: Each night, choose a player: if they are nominated & executed by an opposing player, your team wins. All players know if you choose a new player. (as a Fearmonger?)
Alch Ability is: If 4 or less players are alive, the Alchemist learns who the Marionette is. [+Marionette]
Alch Ability is: The Alchemist knows when all Minions are dead. [-Mastermind]
Alch Ability is: The Alchemist starts knowing a word. The first good player (not the Alchemist) to say the word is safe from all Minion abilities starting when they say it.
The Alchemist Pit-Hag cannot create Minions or Demons.
Alch Ability is: The Alchemist gains the ability of the first Minion to die. They learn which ability they gain.

Alch Ability is: Each day, the Alchemist may publicly choose an alive player. If the Alchemist chooses the Spy, they die tonight & the Demon kills no-one. The Spy can't misregister to the Alchemist. [+Spy]
The Alchemist might not be able to push an execution through if only they voted.

Alch Ability is: Each day, the Alchemist may publicly choose an alive player. If the Alchemist chooses the Widow, they die tonight & the Demon kills no-one. The Widow can't poison the Alchemist. [+Widow]
Alch Ability is: Each day, the Alchemist may publicly choose an alive player. If the Alchemist chooses the Wraith, they die tonight & the Demon kills no-one. [+Wraith]
Alch Ability is: On night X, all Minions are poisoned until dusk. [X Outsiders]
An Al-Hadikhia must choose to die if chosen by the Scarlet Woman turned into the Al-Hadikhia.
If the Cannibal gains the Juggler ability, they learn how many guesses the original Juggler got correct & can make a Juggle tomorrow.
If the Cannibal with the Princess ability nominates & executes a player on their first day with the ability, the Demon doesn't kill tonight, even if they lose their Princess ability.
If the Demon would have the Drunk ability, the Boffin chooses a Townsfolk player to have this ability instead.
If the Vizier pushes on the Goblin after they've claimed to be Goblin during their defense, it might fail.
The Baron might only add 1 Outsider if the added Outsider is Heretic.
The Heretic is poisoned if the Godfather is or was in play. If the Godfather dies or leaves play, a Heretic learns a Godfather was in play.
If the Heretic is the Lleech host, the Heretic has no ability as long as the Lleech is in-play.
The Heretic is poisoned if the Spy is or was in play. If the Spy dies or leaves play, a Heretic learns a Spy was in play.
The Heretic is poisoned if the Widow is or was in play. The Widow will send out a ping even if poisoned.
You don't learn your other Outsider abilities.
You don't learn your other Outsider abilities.
You might only have 2 Outsider abilities.
If the Summoner chooses the Target, they are told to choose again.
The Target doesn't register as Outsider to the Fang Gu.
The Kazali learns the King before choosing minions. The King cannot be chosen by the Kazali.
If all of evil team agree to become Legion, majority of players (including ALL evil) become Legion. If Legion is in play, the Hatter has no ability.
If Legion is summoned, majority of players (including ALL evil players) become Legion. They might all learn each other.
If an evil player nominates & executes the player chosen by the Exorcist, the Exorcist's team wins.
If an evil player nominates & executes a player protected by the Innkeeper, the Innkeeper's team wins.
If an evil player nominates & executes a player protected by the Monk, the Monk's team wins.
If an evil player nominates & executes the Soldier, the Soldier's team wins.
If the Goblin is babysitting Lil' Monsta and claims Goblin before being executed, good wins.
If the Vizier is in-play, the Magician is immune to the Vizier's ability.
The Magician starts knowing a Wraith is in play. Each day, the Magician may choose a living player: the Wraith, if chosen, is the only person that dies tonight.
Magician is shown as a Demon in the Demon Info step. Legion know a Magician is in-play.
If the Magician is alive, the Storyteller chooses which Minion babysits Lil' Monsta. The Minions see the Magician as a minion.
The Magician starts knowing a Lord of Typhon is in-play.
The Magician starts knowing a Kazali is in-play.

The Apprentice with the Marionette ability believes they are a good Apprentice with a Townsfolk ability, but they are not. The Demon knows the Apprentice is evil with the Marionette ability. The Apprentice doesn't learn the Demon.
If the Marionette thinks that they are the Huntsman, an Outsider might have been added during setup.
The Marionette can sit next to the Recluse.
The Marionette might not learn an in-play good character.
Each night*, if the votes were secret the Flowergirl chooses a player: if they were nominated, they learn all players who voted on them.
The Butler's vote doesn't count if their master didn't vote.
The Pit-Hag cannot create a Heretic.
The Pit-Hag cannot create a Summoner.
One of the Demon's good neighbors becomes the good Marionette instead.
If the Cannibal gains the Poppy Grower ability, the Minion(s) & Demon(s) learn each other once the Cannibal loses the ability.
The Kazali chooses which minions, but not which players. The Poppy Grower cannot become a Minion by the Kazali.
The Wraith doesn't wake with evil players, but still open their eyes.

If the Princess nominates & executes on their first day, the Princess learns an alive player isn't the Leviathan. The Princess' nomination on their first day doesn't count for the Leviathan's ability.
If the Princess nominates & executes on their first day, the Po must choose a player tonight.
If the Princess nominates & executes on their first day, the Princess learns a Riot is in-play tonight.
If the Princess nominates & executes on their first day, the Princess learns a Summoner is in-play tonight.
If the Princess nominates & executes on their first day, the Storyteller chooses who dies the next night the Zombuul can kill.
If the Storyteller is the first nomination on Riot's 3rd day nothing happens. The Storyteller cannot be nominated in the middle of a Riot.
If an evil player nominates & executes the player chosen by the Exorcist, the Exorcist's team wins.
If the Riot is created from the Hatter, the Riot day is the Riot's second day.
If an evil player nominates & executes a player protected by the Innkeeper, the Innkeeper's team wins.
The Mayor may choose to stop the riot. If they do so when only 1 Riot is alive, your team wins. Otherwise, evil wins.
If an evil player nominates & executes a player protected by the Monk, the Monk's team wins.
If an evil player nominates & executes the Soldier, the Soldier's team wins.
The Summoner registers as the Demon to the Golem until they make a Demon.
If a Lord of Typhon is summoned, they must neighbor a Minion & their other neighbor might become an evil Minion. If another Minion isn't made, the Summoner will be told & asked to reconsider.
If the Summoner summons a Riot, the Riot happens the next day.
The Summoner registers as the Demon to the Slayer until they make a Demon.
The Vizier cannot push an execution on the Storyteller, whether or not an Atheist is in play.
The Vizier knows the Fearmonger chosen player. If the Vizier pushes on the target, it will fail.
If the Vizier is holding Lil' Monsta, they die when executed.
